MINI MINUTES: JPT Paul Arshawsky, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Magnolia Properties, Inc. represented by Arthur Scampa.
Attorney Saul M. Ferster appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant John J. Reyes is present.
Limited Scope Attorney Sarah Wells appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for a Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Judge Pro Tem, counsel and litigants confer privately for settlement discussions.

Settlement reached, a stipulation for entry of judgment is filed with the clerk, the trial date is off calendar.
